topic: My building's fire escape ends three feet above the ground with a clean metal cut and it used to reach the ground
title: My Building's Fire Escape Ends Three Feet Above the Ground and the Cut Is Clean | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My fire escape ends three feet above the ground. The cut is clean. It used to reach.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior of a six story brick walk up building with a fire escape ending three feet above the ground floor, the cut clean and smooth, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Six story walk up in Queens. Lived here eleven years.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a Queens apartment building at dusk, brick facade with iron fire escapes, no people, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a hand holding a cigarette on a fire escape platform at dawn, only the hand visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: April third. Stepped out. Last rung was waist height above the alley.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of the bottom rung of a metal fire escape ladder with the alley pavement three feet below, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Looked down. The bottom three feet were gone.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a person's legs at the edge of a fire escape platform looking down at the alley, no face visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The cut was clean. Smooth metal. No torch marks. No saw lines.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a clean metal cut on a fire escape ladder, no torch or saw marks visible on the metal, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Asked the super. He had not noticed.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a residential building superintendent in coveralls seen from behind at the building entrance, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Walked across the street to look. From below it looks normal.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior of the same building viewed from across the street, the fire escape appearing intact and reaching the ground from this angle, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Photographed it from both angles. The photos do not match. Same building.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of two side by side smartphone photographs of the same fire escape from different angles, one showing it reaching ground, one showing it cut, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last week the escape stopped four feet above the ground. The cut had moved up.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a fire escape ladder now ending four feet above the ground, the cut higher than before, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have stopped smoking on the fire escape.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a small apartment kitchen with a fire escape window closed and locked, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The escape is still being cut. Slowly. Toward my window.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a fire escape window in an apartment with the iron grate of the escape visible just outside, the bottom of the escape no longer attached to anything below, vertical 9:16 framing
